chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1879 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability. 27.05.2025 Petitioner, Roop Mala Singh, is present in person. On 13.05.2025 following order was passed: “13.05.2025 Petitioner, Ms. Roop Mala Singh, is present in person. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. Counsel is confronted as to how writ can be issued to a private person. To come up on 20.05.2025.” On 20.05.2025 following order was passed” “20.05.2025 On the last date following order was passed: “Counsel is confronted as to how writ can be issued to a private person. To come up on 20.05.2025.” Today, adjournment is being sought by Mr. Dileep Singh, on behalf of petitioner. At his request the matter is adjourned to 27.05.2025.” Petitioner appearing in person remains unable to assist as to maintainability hereof, inter alia, as present petition requires adjudication of factual controversy, which could not be addressed without evidence etc; not amenable to writ jurisdiction. It could not be articulated as to how writ could be issued to private persons. In view hereof, petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
